title: After you apply - Canada.ca
content:
## How long can you stay in Canada
The temporary resident permit for foreign nationals who were in state care is usually valid for a minimum of 1 year.
- leave Canada by the expiry date of the permit or
- get a new permit before your current one expires
The temporary resident permit
- may be cancelled by an officer at any time
- is no longer valid once you leave Canada, unless you have specifically been authorized to leave and re-enter
